content.en:
After several Sevenfold Ancestors of Hanhai Palace passed through the Cut Black Mountain, they searched for a long time in this area, exploring one community boundary after another, but they did not find the figure of the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor.

"There is the Extreme Dao Will of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, and it seems that the Dao Ancestors of Hanhai Palace have come here and are looking for me. It's a pity that without the Hanhai Realm Map, even if my cultivation plummets, you won't be able to spy on the hidden nature of the Void Dao Bead!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor was very confident in the Void Mi Dao Bead, this was one of the Primordial Ancient Treasures, and it belonged to the same category of Primordial Ancient Treasures as the Hanhai Boundary Diagram.

It's just that the Hanhai Boundary Map and the Hanhai Boundary are smelted together, and they can exert more power.

In the past, when he cultivated to be a half-step eightfold ancestor, he had the cover of the Void Dao Bead, and he could barely block the exploration of the Hanhai Boundary Map.

But now, his cultivation has plummeted, and even if he urges the Void Mi Dao Bead, he can't shield the exploration of the Hanhai Realm Diagram in the Hanhai Realm Diagram.

But in this area, he is still very confident, even if the Yae Origin Ancestor comes, he may not be able to find him.

"In the next few years, I will keep a low profile, and when the Dao Ancestors of Hanhai Palace can't help but leave, I will act again!"

Black Silence Dao Ancestor thought to himself.

The years have passed, and tens of millions of years of the Origin Era have passed.

The Dao Ancestors of Hanhai Palace searched here countless times, but they didn't find the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, so they gave up completely and left this area directly.

......

Archean Plains boundary.

"Over the years, some of the Sevenfold Ancestors have been exploring the boundaries of this area, why on earth?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled, but he didn't ask these Sevenfold Ancestors, after all, people didn't necessarily care about him.

However, these Sevenfold Ancestors didn't do anything else, so he didn't care.

But he also guessed that these Sevenfold Origin Ancestors should belong to the Dao Ancestors of the Hanhai District Realm.

"Could it be that you're here to look for the Black Silence Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian had some guesses about this.

But whether the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor came here or not, he really can't say.

Now, those Dao Ancestors in the Hanhai District Boundary have left, and he is going to find the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor by himself, and communicate with other Dao Ancestors by the way, to see which Dao Ancestors have disappeared recently.

"The Suppression Killing Dao Ancestor is missing!"

This is the only sixfold peak Dao Ancestor who has been missing silently in recent years.

However, the disappearance of just one Sixfold Peak Ancestor didn't mean anything.

Wow!

Ye Tian soon came to the community boundary where he killed Dao Ancestor, but after using his copying talent to probe around, he didn't find anything.

"Go to other community boundaries!"

In the following years, Ye Tian explored the nearby community boundaries one by one, and with the scope of his current copying talent, it would not take long to explore a community boundary.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian came to a community boundary called the Dragon Qi District Boundary, and after entering this community boundary, Ye Tian still explored as usual.

One by one, the high-level origin regions were shrouded by Ye Tian's copying talent, and the talents of countless living beings were under Ye Tian's exploration, and no one of the original ancestors could hide from his exploration.

It can be said that with his current cultivation, the copying talent can penetrate almost anywhere, and there are too few places that can shield the copying talent.

Abrupt.

"Hey, this area is a little weird, it makes it impossible for my copying talent to extend over!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

If this is a forbidden place, it would be fine, but this is obviously a very ordinary original domain!

Immediately, he explored it with his Extreme Will, and without any obstacles, he could easily explore this area clearly, and there seemed to be nothing special here.

However, he used his copying talent to probe the creatures in this area, but he couldn't detect it, and it seemed that there was a force blocking his copying talent.

If it weren't for his talent for copying, he really wouldn't have been able to see the clues of this place.

When Ye Tian came to this original domain and continued to use his copying talent to investigate, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor panicked.

"Damn, this half-step Sevenfold Ancestor won't find me, right?" Black Silence Dao Ancestor thought to himself, "Impossible, those Sevenfold Ancestors can't find me, how can a mere half-step Sevenfold Ancestor find out about my existence!" As long as I don't leak any breath and don't make a move, he won't know about my existence!"

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian still hadn't found the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor.

However, he still had a way of making sure if there were any oddities here.

Whoa!!

With a wave of Ye Tian's hand, countless creatures disappeared.

In the blink of an eye, all the cultivators in this small origin domain were removed by Ye Tian and directly moved to another origin domain.

That way, he would have no problem destroying this original domain.

"Endless Golden Light!"

Ye Tian's power enveloped this Origin Domain, instantly shattering this Origin Domain.

Although the Sumeru Dao Bead is an Primordial Ancient Treasure that can hide the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, it is impossible for it to disappear completely, and under the attack of endless golden light, the Sumeru Dao Bead is revealed.

I saw that the gray-white Void Mi Dao Bead was presented in the endless golden light, it was so conspicuous.

"Damn it, you let me be exposed!"

The Black Silent Dao Ancestor was furious.

He knew that he had to kill Ye Tian as soon as possible, otherwise once he was exposed, he would be known by a large number of Dao Ancestors, and maybe some Dao Ancestors would run out of here and let the Dao Ancestors of Hanhai Palace know.

When the time comes, he will have nowhere to run!

"Give me death!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor shot directly, and a pair of black hands grabbed Ye Tian directly.

"Black Silence Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, he didn't expect the Black Silence Dao Ancestor to hide here.

"It's so deep hidden, even if it's a copy talent, you can't detect him, if you find out that something is wrong here, try to attack, and really let him dodge!"

Facing the attack of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian did not panic at all.

If he had just broken through to the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, he might not really be the opponent of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor at this moment.

But now, he has broken the boundary nine times, and his strength is far beyond when he first broke through.

Those half-step sevenfold ancestors who comprehended the Eightfold Yuan Dao, even if they broke through many boundaries, they were probably not his opponents.

The endless golden light instantly tore apart the black hand of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, and coupled with the Endless Black Domain suppressing the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, the battle was completed in an instant.

"The Half-Step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor of the Ninefold Yuan Dao!!!"

The Black Silent Dao Ancestor was stunned.

Although there are many Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao in the Hanhai District Realm, most of them are only Sevenfold Origin Ancestors, and those who have cultivated to the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor have left the Hanhai District Boundary.

Moreover, compared to the Dao Ancestors who comprehended the Eightfold Yuan Dao, the proportion of Dao Ancestors who comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao was too small!

"In such a remote and weak area, it is very rare to give birth to a half-step sevenfold ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and it has also made me come across it, I ......"

The Black Lonely Dao Ancestor felt that he was too unlucky!
